personal_info.name: Aashray
personal_info.title: Automation QA Engineer | Software Test Engineer

summary: Automation QA Engineer with 2+ years of experience in testing healthcare SaaS applications, specializing in test automation, API testing, and regression framework development. Strong expertise in Selenium, Cypress, Java, Python, Postman, and SQL.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) – Computer Science Engineering

responsibilities: Designed and maintained Selenium and Cypress automation frameworks using Page Object Model.
Automated regression test suites reducing manual effort by 30-40%.
Conducted API testing using Postman and SQL backend validations.
Worked in Agile environments and managed defects using Azure DevOps.
Executed manual and automation testing for healthcare applications.
Built and enhanced Cypress and Selenium automation suites.
Performed API testing and SQL backend validations.
Supported releases and collaborated with cross-functional teams.

projects.name: Automated Regression Test Framework
description: Developed automation framework using Selenium, Java and TestNG.
Built reusable utilities for browser handling and reporting.
Integrated automated execution into build validation.

projects.name: Internal Workflow Automation
description: Built automation scripts for repetitive QA workflows.
Reduced human error and accelerated regression cycles.

highlights: Reduced regression effort by 40%+ through automation.
Strong experience in Healthcare SaaS domain.
Hands-on expertise in Selenium, Cypress, API and SQL testing.
Excellent collaboration with developers in Agile teams.
